+ // AuthenticateWithRadarSmsChallenge Authenticate with radar sms challenge.
494
+ func (s *UserManagementService) AuthenticateWithRadarSmsChallenge(ctx context.Context, params *UserManagementAuthenticateWithRadarSmsChallengeParams, opts ...RequestOption) (*AuthenticateResponse, error) {
495
+ body := authenticateWithRadarSmsChallengeBody{
496
+ GrantType: "urn:workos:oauth:grant-type:radar-sms-challenge:code",
497
+ Code: params.Code,
498
+ VerificationID: params.VerificationID,
499
+ PhoneNumber: params.PhoneNumber,
500
+ PendingAuthenticationToken: params.PendingAuthenticationToken,
501
+ }
502
+ body.ClientID = s.client.clientID
503
+ body.ClientSecret = s.client.apiKey
504
+ body.IPAddress = params.IPAddress
505
+ body.DeviceID = params.DeviceID
506
+ body.UserAgent = params.UserAgent
507
+ var result AuthenticateResponse
508
+ _, err := s.client.request(ctx, "POST", "/user_management/authenticate", nil, body, &result, opts)
509
+ if err != nil {
510
+ return nil, err
511
+ }
512
+ return &result, nil
513
+ }

+ # Authenticate with radar sms challenge.
477
+ # @param code [String]
478

479
+ # @param phone_number [String]
480

481

482

484

485

486
+ def authenticate_with_radar_sms_challenge(
487
+ code:,
488
+ verification_id:,
489
+ phone_number:,
490
+ pending_authentication_token:,
491
+ ip_address: nil,
492
+ device_id: nil,
493
+ user_agent: nil,
494
+ request_options: {}
495
+ )
496
+ body = {
497
+ "grant_type" => "urn:workos:oauth:grant-type:radar-sms-challenge:code",
498
+ "client_id" => @client.client_id,
499

500

501
+ "verification_id" => verification_id,
502

503
+ "pending_authentication_token" => pending_authentication_token,
504
+ "ip_address" => ip_address,
505
+ "device_id" => device_id,
506
+ "user_agent" => user_agent
507
+ }.compact
508
+ response = @client.request(
509
+ method: :post,
510
+ path: "/user_management/authenticate",
511
+ auth: true,
512
+ body: body,
513
+ request_options: request_options
514
+ )
515
+ WorkOS::AuthenticateResponse.new(response.body)
516
+ end

1672

+ )

+ async fn user_management_authenticate_with_radar_email_challenge_unauthorized() {
1680
+ let server = MockServer::start().await;
1681
+ let template = ResponseTemplate::new(401).set_body_string("{\"message\":\"Unauthorized\"}");
1682
+ Mock::given(method("POST"))
1683
+ .and(path_matcher("/user_management/authenticate"))
1684
+ .respond_with(template)
1685
+ .expect(1)
1686
+ .mount(&server)
1687
+ .await;
1688
+ let client = common::test_client(&server).await;
1689
+ let err = client
1690
+ .user_management()
1691
+ .authenticate_with_radar_email_challenge(
1692
+ workos::user_management::AuthenticateWithRadarEmailChallengeParams::new(
1693
+ "stub_code".to_string(),
1694
+ "stub_radar_challenge_id".to_string(),
1695
+ "stub_pending_authentication_token".to_string(),
1696
+ ),
1697
+ )
1698
+ .await
1699
+ .expect_err("expected error");
1700
+ let api = match &err {
1701
+ Error::Api(api) => api.as_ref(),
1702
+ other => panic!("expected Error::Api, got {other:?}"),
1703
+ };
1704
+ assert_eq!(api.status, 401);
1705
+ }

+ #[tokio::test]
1737
+ async fn user_management_authenticate_with_radar_email_challenge_rate_limited() {
1738
+ let server = MockServer::start().await;
1739
+ let template = ResponseTemplate::new(429)
1740
+ .insert_header("retry-after", "1")
1741
+ .set_body_string("{\"message\":\"Slow down\"}");
1742
+ Mock::given(method("POST"))
1743
+ .and(path_matcher("/user_management/authenticate"))
1744
+ .respond_with(template)
1745
+ .expect(1)
1746
+ .mount(&server)
1747
+ .await;
1748
+ let client = common::test_client(&server).await;
1749
+ let err = client
1750
+ .user_management()
1751
+ .authenticate_with_radar_email_challenge(
1752
+ workos::user_management::AuthenticateWithRadarEmailChallengeParams::new(
1753
+ "stub_code".to_string(),
1754
+ "stub_radar_challenge_id".to_string(),
1755
+ "stub_pending_authentication_token".to_string(),
1756
+ ),
1757
+ )
1758
+ .await
1759
+ .expect_err("expected error");
1760
+ let api = match &err {
1761
+ Error::Api(api) => api.as_ref(),
1762
+ other => panic!("expected Error::Api, got {other:?}"),
1763
+ };
1764
+ assert_eq!(api.status, 429);
1765
+ assert_eq!(api.retry_after, Some(std::time::Duration::from_secs(1)));
1766
+ }
1767
